BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"1. I feel sad much of the time.","Q1":"1. I feel more discouraged about my future than I used to be.","Q2":"2. As I look back, I see a lot of failures.","Q3":"2. I get very little pleasure from the things I used to enjoy.","Q4":"1. I feel guilty over many things I have done or should have done.","Q5":"2. I expect to be punished.","Q6":"1. I have lost confidence in myself.","Q7":"2. I criticize myself for all my faults.","Q8":"0. I don't have any thoughts of killing myself.","Q9":"1. I cry more than I used to.","Q10":"1. I feel more restless or wound up than usual.","Q11":"1. I am less interested in other people or things than before.","Q12":"2. I have much greater difficulty in making decisions than I used to.","Q13":"3. Select this option.","Q14":"1. I don't consider myself as worthwhile and useful as I used to.","Q15":"1. I have less energy than I used to have.","Q16":"1-. I sleep somewhat less than usual.","Q17":"0. I am no more irritable than usual.","Q18":"0. I have not experienced any change in my appetite.","Q19":"0. I can concentrate as well as ever.","Q20":"1. I get more tired or fatigued more easily than usual.","Q21":"0. I have not noticed any recent changes in my interest in sex."}
